name: 法玛斯 | 复仇
descriptionEn: A cheap option for cash-strapped players, the FAMAS effectively fills the niche between more expensive rifles and the less-effective SMGs. It has been painted with a woodgrain pattern using high gloss paint. Here—an axe for you to grind... - Booth, Arms Dealer
descriptionZh: 给手头紧的玩家的一个廉价选择，法玛斯有效地填补了昂贵的步枪和杀伤力较低的微型冲锋枪之间的空缺。 它采用了高光漆料绘制的木纹涂装。 给你把斧子，好好磨吧…… ——军火商布兹
